downstream_handoff: -> Automation Workflow Specialist (CRM) to DEPLOY the sequence via Skill 44
compliance: CAN-SPAM: physical address + one-click unsubscribe required in footer [CLIENT TO SUPPLY mailing address].

emails.subject: Your FocusForge application is in — here's what happens next
emails.hook: You just took the first step most people never do: you decided your attention is worth defending.
emails.body_summary: Confirm receipt, set the expectation of the doubled-hours-or-refund guarantee, invite them to book the intake call.

emails.subject: The real reason you lose 2 hours a day (it isn't willpower)
emails.hook: It's not that you're undisciplined. Your environment is built to interrupt you.
emails.body_summary: Reframe the problem as a system problem (Hormozi: lower effort/sacrifice in the value equation), preview the focus operating system.

emails.subject: What 'double your deep-work hours' actually looks like
emails.hook: Week 1: an attention audit. Week 12: a focus system you keep forever.
emails.body_summary: Make the dream outcome concrete and the time-delay short (first win in week 1); restate the guarantee as risk-reversal.

emails.subject: Why we put the entire risk on us
emails.hook: If your tracked deep-work hours don't at least double in the first 4 weeks, you pay nothing.
emails.body_summary: Lead with the outcome-based guarantee (Hormozi risk-reversal) to raise perceived likelihood of achievement.

emails.subject: Last call before this cohort closes
emails.hook: The 1:1 format means seats are limited. This is the last email before we close intake.
emails.body_summary: Scarcity grounded in a real constraint (1:1 capacity), final CTA.
